MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-02-2003 Continued To Sep-05-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Thomas J. Tarkoff, Esq. of GUICHARD, TARKOFF & PORTELLO 925/934-9690, for
defendant THE CLARK CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC. moving for summary judgment
